description: Clarify that BK proves density 1 non-effectively, and that the exponent 2δ-1 = 0.062 refers to growth in the number of representable numerator-denominator pairs (R(d)), not unique denominator coverage nor its convergence law; update the summary text to remove the statement that BK predicts power-law convergence for density.
action_taken: Clarify that BK proves density 1 non-effectively, and that the exponent 2δ-1 = 0.062 refers to growth in the number of representable numerator-denominator pairs (R(d)), not unique denominator coverage nor its convergence law; update the summary text to remove the statement that BK predicts power-law convergence for density.
